subject: Fwd: Message Sheet
body:
Typical Brice and Karen.
 
I assume that you are still trying to keep Julie and Brinsley happy so they  
will stay till the end of the year.  If so, then am I correct that we give  
them their vacation request and, contrary to Brice and Karen's  e-mail, not tell 
them that if they leave early their vacation time  will be subject to review?
 
Please advise.
 
Darren

From: Zorroranch@aol.com
Subject: Message Sheet
Date: Thu, 27 Mar 2008 19:18:30 GMT
To: DKIESQ@aol.com

Hi Darren,
    J & B have requested vacation - 5/2/08 -  5/26/08 (16 days leave) 
intitled to 20 for the year. Would recommend that they  be informed in writing that 
if they terminate their positions before the  end of the year, vacation days 
would be reviewed, with possible pay back being  required. Noting JE will need 
to be informed of the requested time as  soon as possible
 
Thanks K

body_html:
Typical Brice and Karen.
 
I assume that you are still trying to keep Julie and Brinsley happy so they will stay till the end of the year.  If so, then am I correct that we give them their vacation request and, contrary to Brice and Karen's e-mail, not tell them that if they leave early their vacation time will be subject to review?
 
Please advise.
 
Darren

From:Zorroranch@aol.com
Subject:Message Sheet
Date:Thu, 27 Mar 2008 19:18:30 GMT
To:DKIESQ@aol.com

Hi Darren,
    J & B have requested vacation - 5/2/08 - 5/26/08 (16 days leave) intitled to 20 for the year. Would recommend that they be informed in writing that if they terminate their positions before the end of the year, vacation days would be reviewed, with possible pay back being required. Noting JE will need to be informed of the requested time as soon as possible
 
Thanks K
